messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0060",
  "title": "以务实策略校准新品预期 瞻准生态位进行资源配置",
  "page_index": 19,
  "page_range": "19"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0061",
    "title": "图表类型",
    "page_range": "19",
    "summary": "This section addresses the topic of chart types, specifically identifying \"line charts\" (折线图) as a recognized category. It can answer questions regarding which chart types are listed or introduced in the document. The excerpt does not provide definitions, procedures, dates, claims, specific tables or figures, metrics, or evidence types."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0062",
    "title": "数据趋势",
    "page_range": "19",
    "summary": "This section provides quantitative data trends across ranking tiers (TOP1 to TOP10) for specific years and conditions. It supports retrieval of:\n- **Topics & Entities:** Yearly performance trends (2023, 2024, 2025) and a modified 2023 dataset excluding the “TOP1 super hit.”\n- **Dates:** 2023, 2024, 2025.\n- **Metrics & Values:** Numerical values at TOP1 and TOP10 for each dataset (2023: 85→~7; 2024: ~30→~12; 2025: ~40→~7; 2023 excl. TOP1: ~45→~6).\n- **Claims & Trends:** All datasets exhibit a consistent gradual decline from TOP1 to TOP10. 2023 shows the highest initial value, 2024 the lowest TOP1 but highest TOP10, and removing the 2023 TOP1 super hit shifts the starting point to ~45.\n- **Figures & Visual Encodings:** Describes a multi-line chart mapping each dataset to specific line styles/colors (2023: blue solid; 2024: cyan solid; 2025: green solid; 2023 excl. TOP1: blue dashed).\n- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative metrics, comparative trend analysis, and chart-based data representation.\n- **Answerable Questions:** What are the TOP1 and TOP10 metric values for 2023, 2024, and 2025? How does excluding the 2023 TOP1 super hit affect the baseline and trend? Which line color/style corresponds to each year in the associated chart? What is the overall value distribution pattern across ranking tiers?"
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0063",
    "title": "具体数值",
    "page_range": "19",
    "summary": "This section provides quantitative metrics for ranked positions (TOP1–TOP10) across specific dates (2023, 2024, 2025) and a conditional 2023 scenario excluding the \"TOP1 super hit.\" It enables retrieval of exact or approximate numerical values per rank, year-over-year metric comparisons, and the distribution shift when the top performer is removed. The content answers questions regarding specific rank thresholds, annual performance trends, and conditional dataset adjustments. Evidence is presented as structured numerical lists (quantitative metrics) without specified units, definitions, or procedural context."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0064",
    "title": "总结",
    "page_range": "19-1",
    "summary": "This section summarizes a chart analyzing ranking-based data trends across 2023, 2024, and 2025. It answers retrieval questions regarding: **Topics & Claims**: Year-over-year performance comparisons and the disproportionate impact of top-tier items on aggregate metrics. Specifically, 2023 records the highest overall data, heavily driven by the TOP1 rank; 2024 remains stable with minimal fluctuation; 2025 shows a significant TOP1 increase while maintaining an overall trend similar to 2023. Excluding the 2023 TOP1 “super hit” reduces data across all rankings, confirming its major influence on overall results. **Dates & Entities**: 2023, 2024, 2025; TOP1 ranking position; “super hit” (超级爆款) products; Diandian Data (点点数据). **Figures, Metrics & Evidence**: Based on a chart visualizing yearly ranking trends and the structural impact of blockbuster items. Evidence is sourced from Diandian Data’s independent research and visualization. **Definitions & Procedures**: None provided in this section."
  }
]

message.content:
This section (Page 19) addresses the calibration of new product expectations and resource allocation through quantitative analysis of ranking-based performance trends. It covers the following retrieval elements:
- **Topics & Entities:** Year-over-year performance trends across ranking tiers (TOP1 to TOP10), the disproportionate impact of "super hit" (超级爆款) products, and chart visualization types (specifically line charts/折线图). Data is attributed to Diandian Data (点点数据).
- **Dates:** 2023, 2024, and 2025.
- **Figures & Visual Encodings:** A multi-line chart mapping dataset trends with specific visual encodings: 2023 (blue solid line), 2024 (cyan solid line), 2025 (green solid line), and 2023 excluding the TOP1 rank (blue dashed line).
- **Metrics & Values:** Quantitative TOP1 and TOP10 values per dataset: 2023 (85→~7), 2024 (~30→~12), 2025 (~40→~7), and 2023 excluding TOP1 (~45→~6). Structured numerical lists provide exact or approximate values per rank without specified units.
- **Claims:** All datasets exhibit a consistent gradual decline from TOP1 to TOP10. 2023 records the highest overall data, heavily driven by the TOP1 rank; 2024 shows stable performance with minimal fluctuation; 2025 demonstrates a significant TOP1 increase while maintaining a trend similar to 2023. Excluding the 2023 TOP1 "super hit" reduces values across all rankings, confirming its major influence on aggregate metrics.
- **Evidence Types:** Quantitative metrics, comparative trend analysis, structured numerical lists, and chart-based data representation sourced from Diandian Data’s independent research.
- **Definitions & Procedures:** None provided.
- **Tables:** None explicitly mentioned.
This content supports retrieval of specific rank thresholds, annual performance comparisons, conditional dataset adjustments, and chart legend mappings.

- **Topics & Entities:** Year-over-year performance trends across ranking tiers (TOP1 to TOP10), the disproportionate impact of "super hit" (超级爆款) products, and chart visualization types (specifically line charts/折线图). Data is attributed to Diandian Data (点点数据).

- **Metrics & Values:** Quantitative TOP1 and TOP10 values per dataset: 2023 (85→~7), 2024 (~30→~12), 2025 (~40→~7), and 2023 excluding TOP1 (~45→~6). Structured numerical lists provide exact or approximate values per rank without specified units.
- **Claims:** All datasets exhibit a consistent gradual decline from TOP1 to TOP10. 2023 records the highest overall data, heavily driven by the TOP1 rank; 2024 shows stable performance with minimal fluctuation; 2025 demonstrates a significant TOP1 increase while maintaining a trend similar to 2023. Excluding the 2023 TOP1 "super hit" reduces values across all rankings, confirming its major influence on aggregate metrics.
